Title: Secure Flight Information
Content:
The Transportation Security Administration requires airlines to collect information from you for purposes of watch list matching.

Each passenger traveling to or from a U.S. destination will be required to provide the following information before an airline can issue a boarding pass:

  • Legal name (as it appears on your government issued photo ID)
  • Gender
  • Date of Birth

For domestic travel a non-expired government issued Photo ID is required. Please select the type of ID you will be presenting at the airport.
